title: Bridge Essay: EEG signatures change during unilateral Yogi nasal breathing.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Heat/Fire** (Phase 3) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Heat/Fire to mechanistic neuroscience through EEG, signatures, change, during, unilateral.

**EEG signatures change during unilateral Yogi nasal breathing.** — Sci Rep. PMID: 35017606. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-021-04461-8. Airflow through the left-and-right nostrils is said to be entrained by an endogenous nasal cycle paced by both poles of the hypothalamus. Yogic practices suggest, and scientific evidence demonstrates, that right-nostril breathing is involved with relatively higher sympathetic activity (arousal states), while left-nostril breathing is associated with arelatively more parasympathetic activity (stress alleviating state). The objective of this study was to further explore this laterality by control
